settings.autoBookmarkStatusTooltipTemplate: If enabled, a bookmark will be saved after {seconds} seconds without scrolling or page changes
settings.autoBookmarkTimeTooltip: Time in s for Auto Bookmark
settings.avoidPageBreakDisabledTooltip: Allow words or sentences to break across pages
settings.avoidPageBreakEnabledTooltip: Avoid breaking words or sentences across pages
settings.blurModeTooltip: Determines if all or only images after the table of contents will be blurred
settings.closeConfirmationTooltip: If enabled, the reader asks for confirmation before closing or reloading when unsaved changes are detected
settings.customReadingPointTooltip: Allows to set a persistent custom point in the reader from which the current progress and bookmark is calculated when enabled
settings.enableScreenLockTooltip: When enabled the reader site attempts to request a WakeLock that prevents device screens from dimming or locking
settings.fontAlreadyStored: A font file with this name is already stored
settings.furiganaStyleFullTooltip: Hidden by default, show on hover or click
settings.furiganaStylePartialTooltip: Display furigana as grayed out text
settings.furiganaStyleToggleTooltip: Hidden by default, can be toggled on click
settings.manualBookmarkTooltip: If enabled, the current position will not be bookmarked when leaving via menu actions
settings.saveFontTooltip: Select a File and Font name to save
settings.selectionToBookmarkTooltip: If enabled, bookmarks will be placed near the selected text instead of the page start
settings.swipeThresholdTooltip: Distance which you need to swipe in order trigger a navigation
settings.noStoredFonts: You have currently no stored Fonts
settings.requiredThemeName: You have to enter a Name!
